AT any rate i shall stall have the internet to keep me in touch with everyone and its not like im  that  far away from home. At any rate ill prolly cruise around blogspot looking for friends and then hit the sack because we have a full day ahead of us at the Ren Faire. YAy ren faire pics and good times. Well that s enough babel for now - Jovial
